one_minute_value_explanation: AOF can now show the incident recovery path before a provider-backed action advances: detect, contain, rollback, recover, notify, learn, and block or resume through governance.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.4 showed one controlled provider execution candidate. v9.5 adds the failure-handling drill for that candidate.
product_review_trigger: If an operator still cannot explain what happens when provider execution fails, reopen product review instead of treating this as documentation only.
not_proven: This capability delta does not prove live incident recovery performance, actual rollback execution, third-party adoption, or market value.
